_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = max(1, total_steps // 10)\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step_idx: int) -> float:\\n        step_num = step_idx + 1\\n        if step_num <= warmup_steps:\\n            return step_num / warmup_steps\\n        progress = (step_num - warmup_steps) / max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps)\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Within a fixed 256-step budget, the baseline trains with a constant low Adam LR and no schedule.
